hardware_constraints_summary.rule: block_dim is derived for each tile: argmax effective_parallelism under 1 <= B <= min(max_available_cores, n_tiles_total(tile))
hardware_constraints_summary.focused_constraints: C1/C2/C4 estimated for T,M,P; C3 estimated/UNKNOWN for Y unless real GraphSyncSolver sidecar is provided

focused_search_parameters: MultiBufferPlan.buffer_multipliers: per eligible buffer nbuf_b in {1,2}
MultiBufferPlan.ub_multiplier (legacy coarse scope knob retained for compatibility)
MultiBufferPlan.l1_multiplier (legacy coarse scope knob retained for compatibility)

fixed_or_derived_parameters.block_dim: derived per tile by select_default_block_dim_for_tile(); not searched

source_meta.note: Python/Triton source files are not parsed in V2.7. Use --des-profile/--trace-profile JSON inputs; source-derived ideas are built into templates manually.

conventional_tensor_signature.note: name-based conventional tensor signature; used as evidence only, not a hard-coded kernel family

schema_coverage.source_input_policy: Python/Triton source is not accepted as structured input; deprecated --source is ignored.
